string 2: Why... do you stand in my way...?
Resistance... is futile...

I can see the future.
None may triumph over fate.
Oh? Then you were able to foresee this future?

A lone human, able to take control over the world
you created, with nothing but love for her friends.

The future is forged by determination and will—
It begins now, from this very moment.

We will all return to our worlds and determine
our own fates, guided by what we believe is right.
So it is time for you, ravager of time, to meet your end!
Alright, now's our chance! Banchos, on me!
Urgh...!
They faltered! Strike now!
Hah...!
Right!
Yaaah!
Right!
Yaaah!
Right!
Yaaah!
Right!
Yaaah!
Yaaah!
Let's go!
Ngh...
Hiyaaaaah!
Hiyaaah!
Hrnh!
Raaaaagh!
Haaah!
Graaaaaaaaagh!
Augh...!
Guh...!
Guh...!
Hah...!
Guh...!
You shall pay dearly for this...

I exist across countless worlds...
I am infinite...
Uh-oh...!

This Akashic Backdoor is becoming unstable,
now that its master has been defeated.

If you don't hurry and get out of there, you might end up
disappearing into some far-flung corner of space-time.
We've gotta find somewhere to evacuate!
Okay, but where?!

This place has already started to crumble. 
We need to get out of here and go back to our previous location...
What is this?! We're completely blocked in!
...Yah!

If you can control the crystals that govern this world,
surely you can do something!
L-Like what?!
All I can do is wish really hard...!
It... It worked!
Is that... a way out?

Woah... that's crazy...
I'm like... the god of this world...
A world that's completely fallin' apart.

Ugh... for real!
I wish I'd gotten more content out of this...!

Our meeting was no coincidence. 
At least, that is what I will choose to believe.

I do not know if those you wish your voice to reach are
in my world, but I will do all I can to relay your message.
I will spread the word that Hiroko Sagisaka has not given up.
We'll all spread that same message in our worlds, too.

It will be a true "collab"...
a bond forged between those who bump fists!

I hope that, in some form, your wish that your voice
will reach across time and space comes true.
Thank you...!

To be honest... I'd been really scared, and I was doing my
best to be brave... But now that I've met all of you here...
...I couldn't have asked for things to have turned out any better!
I hope everything goes well for you back in your own worlds!
Everything started shaking again!
We'd better get out of here, too!
Hnh...!
I think this one's for me, and that one's for you.
Guess I'd better be going now!

Hey, {player}... so I actually came so close
to giving up, a bunch of times!

But every time I felt like my heart was breaking, 
the same image would pop into my head, and it gave me courage.

It was the thought of the hero from my favorite anime,
who would always rush to the rescue, no matter what.

I'm sure the same is true for Inori.
After all, she loved that show, too!
Agent Alpha... is our hero!
Thank you so much for all your help, {player}.

Well, so long!
I hope we can "collab" again sometime!

That Akashic Backdoor has been cut off
from the rest of space-time.

It should no longer function as a pathway, meaning
the threat it posed to the laws of reality has passed.
However, Parallelmon can travel across space-time.

That means it's possible that a Parallelmon born in
another timeline could start causing trouble again.

Until then, you'd better rest up. You are sure to
have your work cut out for you again at that point.
For now, though... well done.
